# Branch And Ownership

- Base branch: `main` | `integration`
- Work branch: `task/<short-name>` | `fix/<short-name>` | `spike/<short-name>` | `review/<short-name>` | `docs/<short-name>`
- Sync upstream used: `origin/main` | `origin/integration`
- Owner: Codex | Antigravity | Human
- File ownership zone:

# Verification

- [ ] `git status --short`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/workflow/Validate-WorkflowDocs.ps1` if workflow docs changed
- [ ] Workbench script validation, or reason skipped:
- [ ] Workbench prefab/audio validation, or reason skipped:
